name: validate_architect_calibration
description: Validate architect profile calibration using historical outcomes

history_csv.description: Path to CSV file with historical profile outcomes

min_rows.description: Minimum number of rows required before evaluating calibration drift

tolerance.description: Maximum allowed gap between the active profile success rate and the best profile

valid.description: Whether the active profile stayed within the configured calibration threshold; INSUFFICIENT still exits 0.

output.description: Validator output (PASS, DRIFT, INSUFFICIENT, or INVALID: <error>)

exit_code.description: Exit code (0 for PASS or INSUFFICIENT, 1 for INVALID, 2 for DRIFT)
